name: Kuilima Cove (Turtle Bay)
tagline: A natural rock barrier makes this a lake — 3-5 turtles virtually guaranteed per session.
parking: Turtle Bay Resort parking — free for beach access (tell the gate you're visiting the public beach)
hours: Open 24 hours (public beach access through Turtle Bay Resort)
bestTime: Morning for calmest water and best turtle sightings
talkStory: The beach is public even though it's at Turtle Bay Resort — don't be intimidated by the resort entrance. The natural rock shelf creates a protected pool that's calm even when the open ocean is rough. Bring your own gear; resort rentals are overpriced. About 1 hr 15 min from Waikiki — combine with a North Shore food truck tour.
